email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Customer Service Officer bij Synergie in Pelt. Uw oproep voor een administratieve duizendpoot met interesse in logistiek sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en vaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheren van klantorders en communicatie, het opvolgen van dossiers en het optimaliseren van processen. Daarvoor werkte ik bij Katoen Natie in de logistiek, waar ik nauwkeurigheid en efficiëntie in een hoogvolume omgeving leerde. Ik ben communicatief, stressbestendig en oplossingsgericht, en ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, met Nederlands op B1-niveau (in opleiding).

Ik ben beschikbaar voor de opleiding in Grobbendonk en voor werk in twee ploegen. Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Officer position at Synergie in Pelt. Your call for an administrative all-rounder with an interest in logistics perfectly matches my experience and skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client orders and communication, follow up on files, and optimize processes. Previously, I worked at Katoen Natie in logistics, where I learned accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume environment. I am communicative, stress-resistant, and solution-oriented, and I speak fluent English and Turkish, with Dutch at B1 level (in training).

I am available for the training in Grobbendonk and for shift work. I would be happy to explain my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Customer Service Officer bij Synergie in Pelt. Uw oproep voor een administratieve duizendpoot met interesse in logistiek spreekt mij enorm aan, omdat ik zowel administratieve als logistieke ervaring combineer.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheren van klantorders van A tot Z, het opvolgen van dossiers en het onderhouden van contact met klanten. Ik werk nauwkeurig en gestructureerd, en ik denk actief mee om processen te verbeteren. Daarvoor werkte ik bij Katoen Natie in de logistiek, waar ik leerde om in een hoogvolume, snelle omgeving efficiënt te werken en chauffeurs te ontvangen. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd om stressbestendig en oplossingsgericht te zijn.

Ik ben communicatief vaardig in het Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau, waarvoor ik momenteel lessen volg om verder te verbeteren. Ik kan vlot overweg met MS Office en ik ben leergierig en initiatiefrijk. Ik ben beschikbaar voor de opleiding in Grobbendonk en voor werk in twee ploegen.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Officer position at Synergie in Pelt. Your call for an administrative all-rounder with an interest in logistics appeals to me greatly, as I combine both administrative and logistics experience.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client orders from A to Z, follow up on files, and maintain contact with clients. I work accurately and structured, and I actively think along to improve processes. Previously, I worked at Katoen Natie in logistics, where I learned to work efficiently in a high-volume, fast-paced environment and to receive drivers. This experience taught me to be stress-resistant and solution-oriented.

I am communicative in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level, for which I am currently taking classes to improve further. I am proficient in MS Office and I am eager to learn and take initiative. I am available for the training in Grobbendonk and for shift work.

I look forward to explaining my motivation and experience in a personal interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Logistics experience at Katoen Natie: accuracy, efficiency, receiving drivers
• Client order management and follow-up at Episto
• Strong communication skills in English and Turkish; Dutch B1 (in training)
• Proficient in MS Office and administrative tools
• Stress-resistant, solution-oriented, and eager to learn
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Client communication & order management: managing client orders from A to Z, follow-up, handling inquiries and complaints
- Logistics & warehouse: accuracy, efficiency, receiving drivers, documentation
- Administrative: structured work, process optimization, MS Office
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Received drivers and ensured correct documentation

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
